mapper.select: SELECT id, ticket_id, sla_policy_id, timer_type, status, threshold_minutes, elapsed_minutes, base_elapsed_minutes, start_at, pause_at, deadline, breached_at, completed_at, is_warned, is_breached, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted FROM sla_timer WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND deleted = 0

update.foreach: UPDATE sla_timer SET status = #{item.status}, elapsed_minutes = #{item.elapsedMinutes}, is_warned = #{item.isWarned}, is_breached = #{item.isBreached}, breached_at = #{item.breachedAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{item.id} AND deleted = 0
